latest.title: Mountains are eating themselves alive
latest.script_key: mountains are dissolving right now watch this valley the glacier scrapes rock into powder that s why the alps are shrinking faster than you think the rock isn t just breaking it s turning to soil your hiking boots are walking on yesterday s mountain ever felt a cliff face like sandpaper that s erosion in action

latest.title: Alpine lakes hide a quiet erosion signal
latest.script_key: watch the shoreline vanish those rocks aren t just sitting there they re rolling that s because the lake itself is slowly eating the mountain the water isn t still it s cutting every wave lifts grains chips away at the rock that s why the shore creeps back each year did you notice the rocks are rounder here than up top
